author: anon-13168fa2
content: Added Tool 5: Node.js and npm section to 00-foundations/04-your-workspace.md between Rust and Folder Structure. Covers LTS install from nodejs.org, verification commands, the -g flag explanation, and why it is needed (MCP servers in Phase 3). Added node/npm verification to the Verifying Your Setup checklist. Also updated 03-real-world-skills/02-working-with-apis.md:36 to reference Phase 0 install and explain -g inline, so a reader who skipped or forgot Phase 0 gets the pointer at the point of confusion.
